posts.author: DavidDvorak (David)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I would like to nest a portfolio under another portfolio. Often we have groups of related projects that we would like to track as a “program”. We want to provide a high level report on program progress, yet we also want to track and report on the projects within that program. Ideally, a portfolio would be the Monday.com item I use to represent a program. However, I’m already using the portfolio object to group projects by team in my IT organization (one portfolio for our infrastructure team, one portfolio for our security team, etc). If I could create portfolios under each portfolio then I could represent our large programs that have nested/child projects.

What are you trying to achieve

I want to track and report on multiple projects using a single object and still use the Monday.com portfolio object to logically separate projects among my different teams in IT
